name: BidMachine
description: Open-source mobile ad exchange and in-app bidding SDK from Stack/Appodeal supporting header bidding and DSPs.

seo.title: BidMachine — Ad Monetization / Mediation
seo.meta_description: BidMachine: Open-source mobile ad exchange and in-app bidding SDK from Stack/Appodeal supporting header bidding and DSPs.

when_to_use: Open-source in-app bidding SDK replacing closed mediation stacks
Header bidding for mobile publishers connecting to multiple DSPs
Transparent programmatic yield optimization without mediation lock-in
Integrating custom DSP demand into mobile app monetization flow

pros: Free to use beyond rev share
cons: Requires engineering effort to integrate and maintain
Demand depends heavily on connected DSPs
Part of Appodeal ecosystem, not standalone
review.verdict: Rare open-source ad exchange, great for transparency, but you'll need engineers to run it properly.
review.best_for: Technical publishers who want audit access and control over the bidding stack.
review.not_for: Non-technical teams wanting plug-and-play mediation without SDK maintenance.
